[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01010010 3
1 01011111 6
2 10110101 5
3 11000001 3
4 10110101 5
5 11100011 5
6 00000000 a
7 10101111 6

01 10000100 2
12 00101001 3
23 00000000 a match 6
34 01001010 3
45 00110100 3
56 01000000 1
67 00010100 2
70 01000000 1
